audit_items.proof_trace: The file contains zero calls to free(), malloc(), calloc(), realloc(), or any heap allocation function — confirmed via grep — making the UAF/double-free assertion vacuously satisfied. nolocks_localtime operates entirely on stack-allocated variables and a caller-provided pointer it never frees; the test-only main() reads localtime()'s static buffer once without freeing it. No heap memory is managed in this file.
